title: Milwaukee Foldable Pocket Knife Fastback 4932471357
features: Integrated gut hook and wire stripper
description: The Milwaukee 4932471357 Flip Utility Knife can be easily activated with one hand. Users can make cuts without exposing the blade thanks to the integrated gut hook, and the blade can be changed without the need for tools or other equipment. The knife also works as a wire stripper. The slim body design and the incorporated belt clip means the knife can be stored and transported with ease and efficiency.
